title: Velvety Fried Kenyan Sardines Skewers
description: A fatty and silky weeknight Kenyan dish featuring sardines, agemono-deep-fry, and FODMAP-friendly ingredients. This recipe is perfect for a quick and delicious dinner.
instructions: Preheat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together the chopped onion, garlic-infused oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped sardines to the bowl and mix well.
Thread the sardine mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Dip each skewer into the coconut milk, coating the sardines completely.
Carefully place the skewers into the hot oil and fry for 3-4 minutes on each side.
Remove the skewers from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the skewers hot, squeezed with lemon juice.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
